review_title: Great tool for small to mid size buisnesses.
author: Jeremy G.
pros: Easy to use for employees to schedule time off. I like that you can see availability of days before requesting them off.
cons: Haven't found any cons on the software/website yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bindle does exactly what it says it does and does it well
description: Very positive. Bindle saves me so much time tracking, approving, and reporting time off and has eliminated all discrepancies. It was the perfect solution as we did not want or need additional HR functionality. The branding does a good job of communicating the overall feel of the site. It was easy to set up and pass over to the team to book and track their own time off and gave managers easy oversite. Customer service was wonderful with the few questions I did have.
author: Leslie G.
pros: Bindle was easy to set up, while still having all the options I needed for my team. It saves me so much time tracking vacation form my team and everyone can track their own balances which saves time and conflict at the end of the year.
cons: Specifically, when looking to add a new company-wide holiday the Action buttons were out of the screen and I didn't scroll past 2021 and 2022 to look for the ADD NEW EVENT. So I added a company-wide vacation day which I then had to undo (one by one) until I got support and created what I really intended.

review_title: Bindle is great for seeing the whole office leave however there are still a few issues
author: Lisa J.
pros: The Wall chart is great to enable us to see leave in advance and also the ease of applying for leave works well.
cons: The leave balances aren't always correct, it's hard to adjust when someone is only taking 2 hours instead of half a day, etc
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: For us this has solved the age old issue of lots of spreadsheets, keeping them up to date, not having records matched, not recalling when someone is due for leave, no consistency amongst forms etc etc. And in addition, for the company to assess entitlements and encourage staff to take leave and reduce the accounting liability.
author: Gary H.
pros: We were able to switch from multiple spreadsheets to an all in one location. We couldn't even manage & accrue leave this simply with MYOB, in particular allowing staff access to view their entitlements, and simply apply and have their leave approved. The extra features such as Time in Lieu and long service accrual are great as well. Also very good support, our requests were answered promptly and even some suggestions integrated.
cons: Only minor issues - No direct method for external HR Management without a sub. Has a roundabout way of doing reports (cant view online). A lot of clicking to get to detail for employees - i.e. needs a one page view summary. Could use a leave cash out request form. Can't do groups for section Admins - have to assign per user.

author: Mary L.
pros: Love how easy Bindle is to use for tracking our PTO management of staff and the visibility it gives everyone. [sensitive content hidden] has always been quick to respond to questions and has been very helpful in assisting in any need I have. I used Bindle at a previous employer and liked it so much I brought it to our company when I joined.
cons: Sometimes the responses are a bit delayed due to Bindle being based on the other side of the world/in another country, but they respond to questions as quickly as they see them during normal business hours.

description: I don't have to track my employees on a spreadsheet anymore - takes a lot less time to approve & keep track of when people are away.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its focused on doing one thing really well. Thats all we needed. Whenever we have small product questions or feedback, the team responds very quickly.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Price, easy to teach and use, easy setup and company helps assist. Nice dashboard, reporting
cons: Cannot assigns more than 1 person to approve, so if someone is on vacation, items need to be manually switched. Would like to assign heirchy of approved. Also would like to move people from one area or region to another in bulk- not one by one
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great little solution that keeps managing holidays etc simple
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ability to synch to our own calendars and the way the approval process works is great. We also like the fact it easily manages what's left.
cons: Could do with some improvements to the navigation for an admin, in particular the company settings although it all made sense in the end.

review_title: So simple yet so effective, love it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The simplicity, user-friendliness and minimalist design. Does everything you need without the clunkiness.
cons: Like everything so far. The only way I could think of improving Bindle is the addition simple charts, graphs or interesting visuals.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software to keep up with staff holidays
description: If works fine, simple to use, amazing customer support.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to use, with many options. Bindle connects to other calendars, so you can see your staff days' off in your usual calendar. The Bindle guys are very helpful, we were missing a feature once and it was implemented within hours!
cons: We need a calendar view, the wallchart is just not what your eyes are used to. Also at holiday booking a calendar option would be more user friendly than the drop down of dates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This tool has been fantastic! I would recommend to small-medium sized businesses. The customer support I have received from the Bindle team is quick and very helpful also. They ask and LISTEN to feedback. Thanks Bindle Team! :)
author: Irene M.
pros: Bindle is a very simple, intuitive platform to use. We are a start-up business of now 30 employees across 3 different business groups. This system is quite generic so it allows us to customise it to what we require for each business and across various countries including Australia, US and Netherlands. Fun, casual user feel and look.
cons: Tracking Time Off In Lieu can be difficult to manage.

description: Having a fast efficient way to track vacation days has been a BIG time saver for us. No more paper copies or lost requests.
author: Todd S.
pros: There are no more paper vacation requests cluttering up my file cabinet since the start of the new year! Its a great, quick way to handle vacation requests.
cons: I would like to see a month by month calendar instead of the way it is broken down right now. It's not bad but would be nice to log on and see a calendar page of the current month. You have to set up and utilize a separate software to notify other staff if an employee is going to be gone. It would be convenient once the vacation day is approved to have a mass email go out alerting other employees of what staff member will be gone and when.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Donnalynn M.
pros: Bindle is super easy to setup and have running to track all employee vacation or personal leave requests. We easily integrated a time in lieu option for ourselves. Bindle is affordable for a small business and beats tracking in excel any day !
cons: Currently there is only 1 administrator type. It would be ideal if each department manager could have admin privileges for just their employees.

review_title: Individuals are more accountable, info is more accurate, processing payroll is much more efficient.
description: Efficient time off management for team of about 15 people in a busy office.
author: Heather W.
pros: Having a centralised place for all staff leave requests which is more efficient, reduces human error, saves paper and time. Clear summary on Wallchart which can be viewed in Outlook alongside other calendars.
cons: Hours can't be customised as required. Need 15 minute intervals, eg. to show that a staff member is out of office for the day on personal or annual leave, but does 45 minutes work from home.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great attendance software for the money
description: By using Bindle, we have cut down on the amount of paper use in our attendance process. It also saves time for both requesting time off and approving it.
author: Lori B.
pros: This product is easy to administer and use. The app is great to use as well. We have just been using it since the beginning of the year and I have only heard positive things from our employees.
cons: The one thing that I don't like is switching between days and hours when looking at balances & bookings. We have one type of PTO that is by the day and another that is by the hour. It would be nice to be able to use different timing by the category.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: excellent software. easy to use and not overdone with bells and whistles.
description: helps track PTO which is exactly what i needed it to do.
author: Kelly K.
pros: i've reached out to customer support twice and received thorough, quick feedback. very responsive and that is much appreciated.
cons: i wish the calendar functionality had an actual calendar so you could see the date on a month view.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Martha H.
pros: I find it easy to use and understand. This is significant as I am not particularly a 'techie' type. I particularly like being able to see the organization's calendar before I approve a vacation, which helps in making a decision.
cons: It would be great to have this interface with Outlook calendar. When I approved vacation time it would be nice to have this show up on Outlook. I still have to do this manually in order to keep track of when people in my department will be gone.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Matt D.
pros: Simple and quick to use. Features a good amount of customisation options without being too complex
cons: It would be good to have more customisable reports, or more feature-rich APIs so we can create our own reports and integrations.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bindle is a great time off tracker for staff
description: It has been excellent. The Bindle team is quick to answer questions and willing to help with all my needs.
author: Jonathan K.
pros: I like the price and functionality of Bindle. It is easy to use.
cons: There is no way to create blackout dates that staff are not permitted to take off.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bindle is extremely easy to use and is exactly what we were looking for with our time off program.
description: An easy and inexpensive way to track time off for our employees. The wall chart enables everyone to see who's taking time off.
author: Shari L.
pros: Very easy to use; interfaces with Outlook; the Bindle team is extremely customer service focused; great value for the money
cons: Wish there were an option to color code different types of time off. Not having any other issues with the system.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Deepti D.
pros: user friendly interface and customizable
cons: nothing comes to mind. didnt use for too long so will wait to see
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Wayne M.
pros: Easy to use, very intuitive (easy for employees to understand and use)
cons: The administrator reporting features are limited
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good. Easy to use. Wish there were a few more options for WFH employees.
description: Tracking of employees out of the office as well as my own vac. time used.
author: Angela W.
pros: It is a very easy to use program. I also like the dashboard so you can see who is out that day and who is not to plan accordingly for the day.
cons: No enough info to chose from - need work from home options. It would be nice to show who is working from home and when as well as have it approved by management.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jason W.
pros: My employees know how much time they have off without me telling them. This provides automatic communication between employees and employer
cons: I would like an app for my phone. Maybe user error there but I could not find it in the app store. It would be great to make it more accessible.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jane O.
pros: Product is easy to use. Availability to view all employees attendance on a daily basis
cons: There is a delay in posting time off to the google calendar. It should be immediate
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
